title: Kya Woh Sach Tha
author: Fever FM – HT Smartcast
description: Real life events se inspired supernatural stories ka collection — jo sunoge, roye nahi to rone par majboor zaroor ho jaoge. Raat ko sunna hoga to neend uda denge ye kahaniyan!

episodes.title: #1 Highway Ka Bhoot
episodes.description: Mumbai ke Anuj ke saath uss raat kya hua — highway par ek aisi mulaqaat jisne unki zindagi badal di.

episodes.title: #2 Bachchi Ki Pret Aatma
episodes.description: Lucknow ke Saurabh Sinha ke saath ghati yeh ghatna — ek bacchi ki aatma jo apna dard sunana chahti thi.

episodes.title: #8 Planchette Ka Bhoot
episodes.description: Bani Chaterjee aur unke doston ki aap beeti — ek planchette game ne jo raaz khola wo sab soch bhi nahi sakte the.

title: Insta Love
author: RosePod
description: Rishi aur Nikita ki love story — breakup ke baad dono ek hi influencer company mein aa jaate hain. Kya intequam hoga ya phir pyaar? Agra se Mumbai tak ka romantic safar.

episodes.title: Ep 1 – Love at First Sight
episodes.description: Rishi aur Nikita ki pehli mulaqaat — Nikita ne challenge kiya, Rishi ne accept. Kya date hogi?

title: Lo-Fi Indian Beats
author: Chill Nation
description: Studying ya relaxation ke liye best Indian instrumentals aur Lo-Fi beats. Shanti aur sukoon ke liye.

episodes.title: Midnight Raag – Sitar Lo-Fi
episodes.description: Calm sitar melody with rainy lofi beats.

episodes.title: Ganga Ghat – Flute Meditation
episodes.description: Soothing flute sounds from the banks of Ganga.

title: Ramayana – Valmiki Katha
author: Sadhguru
description: Shri Ram ki sampurna katha — dharma, prem aur tyaag ki anokhi gaatha.

episodes.title: Shri Ram Janm
episodes.description: Raja Dashrath ke ghar charo bhaion ka janm.

title: Divine Mantras
author: Spiritual India
description: Powerful mantras for daily positive energy and peace. Om Namah Shivaya to Gayatri Mantra.

episodes.title: Maha Mrityunjaya Mantra
episodes.description: Powerful healing mantra of Lord Shiva.

episodes.title: Gayatri Mantra – 108 Times
episodes.description: The mother of all mantras for wisdom and light.

title: Kids Special – Panchatantra
author: Dadi Ma
description: Bacchon ke liye moral stories aur neeti kathaon ka sangreh.

episodes.title: Chattur Khargosh
episodes.description: Buddhimani se kaise sher ko haraya.

title: Bollywood Retro Hits
author: Radio Nasha
description: Kishore Kumar, Lata Mangeshkar aur Mohd. Rafi ke evergreen songs ka collection.

episodes.title: Zindagi Ek Safar – Kishore Kumar
episodes.description: Classic road trip song from Andaz.
